data.body: external-integration stale-stub fix (5e55) is a small interface cascade: live outbound apply-roundtrip needs get_baseline (landed #672/33f0a7ed2), then surfaced is_pending (run 29304506843). Added is_pending + recover_pending_bindings (#674, landing) — now a superset of the passing integration-tier stub's set {get_jira_key,is_bound,get_local_id,is_pending,get_baseline}. Will re-run external-integration after #674 lands to confirm green, then close 5e55. All other workflows green on main: test.yml/codeql/eval/optionality/verify-identity (d9aa merge), terraform-drift (drift reconciled), mirror-guard, reconcile-bridge-canary, gerrit-verify.
